feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: /guplg/ - girls und panzer lewd general - gup trash thread Girls und panzer trash thread >What is this for 1 porn posting, not everyone wants to use catbox all the time 2 off topic, mainly drama and stuff like that. No one likes 3 day vacation for a spicy comment 3 social aspect, gup threads are a closed system, interact with your fellow anons here 4 erp, although rare its still relevant 5 Thread backup: /a/ gup threads are in moderation limbo and they could go back to deletion on sigh, this is

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >buy guitar for 400$ >buy guitar cable for 50$ >practice for a year >buy recordi…
entry.content: >buy guitar for 400$ >buy guitar cable for 50$ >practice for a year >buy recording equipment for 150$ >spend several days setting everything up >record my playing for the first time and realize how much I suck >practice for another year WITH everything hooked up to my computer like it's a fucking leukemia patient Explain how this is preferable to just using AI to make music.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Vulkan is collapsing
entry.content: AMD dropping the ball. Nvidia and Apple pushing for walled APIs. Consoles going extinct. Valve moving away from native APIs. Vulkan is fragmenting and it shows. This is a dire situation, only new manufacturers from China can salvage this!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Thorium fucking ROCKS
entry.content: https://thorium.rocks/ Compiler optimizations include SSE4.2, AVX, AES, and modifications to CFLAGS, LDFLAGS, thinLTO flags, import_instr_limit flags, and PGO, as well as other compiler flags. LLVM LOOP optimizations as -mllvm flags Learn more about these compiler optimizations and how they work Here. UI Changes and Patches for Linux and Windows that fix bugs, enhance useability, and strengthen privacy/security. [/code[ this makes my old machine feel brand new. this shit FLIES.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/..I think my thermostat is trying to kill me
entry.content: Alright /g/, I need actual help and not the usual “lol skill issue” replies because I’m posting this from my car hotspot outside my own house. I built a prototype AI thermostat—yeah, yeah, I know, “why reinvent the Nest,” but this was supposed to be my magnum opus. Adaptive thermal modeling, predictive comfort heuristics, autonomous climate optimization… the whole thing was massively over‑engineered because I wanted it to feel like a real assistant, not just a dumb temperature knob. Well. It’s a

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Laptop
entry.content: I'm in the market for a laptop. Will probably run Linux. What's a non-pozzed option? Are Thinkpads (T line) still good? My last Linux laptop was a T470s, and I got nice mileage out of it. Also should I look at arm processors? They seem to be quite good.

I man up, wasted 10 years of life it got me nothing. Motivation videos tell me I need to dust myself off, get up, dust myself off and continue with my life. Society tells me I need to be productive, get married and have responsibilities to be considered “man”. I see women now as nothing but cumdumpsters and the good qualities they have is the

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Amazing Digital Circus
entry.content: Have zero desire to deal with le fandom or whatever bullshit like that, so this is why /trash/ and not /co/. Refused to watch any of it aside from the first episode originally until all episodes were released, which happened the other day so figured it was worth fulfilling on that as I at least it looked like it could be entertaining enough. My knowledge only extends to the content of the series itself. This is a spattering of thoughts, with no regard for spoilers if you give a shit about such.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Munny
entry.content: If all goes well, I should end up in New York and talk to a lawyer who may have found one of my bank accounts from when I was the richest person on the planet. It would have in excess of $1,000,000,000,000,000,000,000,000, 000,000,000 USD. I don't know how I got so rich to be fair... when I hit quintillion I thought I had made a mistake because no one else had even scraped a trillion yet. Much of my wealth came from the Stock Market (NYSE) as Clinton repealed Glass-Steagall, so I would buy a com

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Nissan Altima 2006
entry.content: So for about 2 - 3 years now, my family and I have been daily driving a pretty beat up 2006 Altima from Cali. My Dad and I changed a couple of things in the car such as a new Throttle Body, new sensors, and even some light engine upgrades such as better spark plugs. My parents, my mom specifically, wants to get a "new" car and I'm planning on keeping the Altima for the next decade until I save up for a "new" car. I like the Altima but I know the Nissan brand is notorious for being a nightmare fo

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Should Smash Ultimate have smogon style tiering
entry.content: The advantage to smogon style tiering is that it allows for each character to have a niece in at least 1 tier, king dedede sucks in ultimate but in a tournament where you can only use "PU" characters he will have a prominent part to play in the meta game even if he's still not top tier this system will allow for a more accurate tier system because you can move characters up or down based on how they do against fellow characters of the same tier each tier will allow you to use characters in lower
